name: Olive Garden Spaghetti Carbonara
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Bacon drippings or olive oil
24 slices Thick-cut bacon, cooked; sliced into 1/2" strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the reserved bacon drippings or olive oil to a heavy skillet over medium heat.
2. Cook the mushrooms with stems until tender, stirring occasionally.
3. Add the shallots and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes until fragrant.
4. In a separate saucepan, melt butter and add flour. Cook on medium heat for 1-2 minutes.
5. Gradually whisk in the hot bechamel sauce while continuously cooking to avoid lumps.
6. Remove from heat immediately and keep warm (180°F).
7. Combine the cooked spaghetti with the remaining ingredients, including parsley, pepper, salt, grated Parmesan cheese, and the reserved bacon strips.
8. Toss gently until well combined and heated through.
